data.name: Add this site to your device for an app-like learner experience.
data.value: Add this site to your device for an app-like learner experience.

data.name: A trial or premium plan is required to enable a second meaning language.
data.value: A trial or premium plan is required to enable a second meaning language.

data.name: Copyright {0} Shahram Vafadar. All rights reserved.
data.value: Copyright © {0} Shahram Vafadar. All rights reserved.

data.name: Darwin Lingua helps learners build practical German vocabulary for work, conversation, and everyday decisions.
data.value: Darwin Lingua helps learners build practical German vocabulary for work, conversation, and everyday decisions.

data.name: Find vocabulary quickly by lemma and open the full word detail for meaning, examples, pronunciation, and study actions.
data.value: Find vocabulary quickly by lemma and open the full word detail for meaning, examples, pronunciation, and study actions.

data.name: Select a CEFR level or topic to preview matching words here.
data.value: Select a CEFR level or topic to preview matching words here.

data.name: Shown first in word details, search results, and learning cards.
data.value: Shown first in word details, search results, and learning cards.

data.name: Topics will appear here as curated vocabulary becomes available.
data.value: Topics will appear here as curated vocabulary becomes available.

data.name: These preferences control the site language and the meanings shown across word pages, lists, scenarios, and practice content.
data.value: These preferences control the site language and the meanings shown across word pages, lists, scenarios, and practice content.

data.name: Used for interface text where localization is available.
data.value: Used for interface text where localization is available.

data.name: Build the vocabulary you actually need for meetings, systems, and daily decisions.
data.value: Build the vocabulary you actually need for meetings, systems, and daily decisions.

data.name: Curated study paths will appear here as soon as they are available for your account.
data.value: Curated study paths will appear here as soon as they are available for your account.

data.name: Darwin Lingua turns German study into a focused workflow: curated workplace collections, CEFR-aware browsing, searchable word detail, pronunciation support, favorites, and recent activity in one calm learning space.
data.value: Darwin Lingua turns German study into a focused workflow: curated workplace collections, CEFR-aware browsing, searchable word detail, pronunciation support, favorites, and recent activity in one calm learning space.

data.name: Filter by CEFR level, topic, and learning context so every session starts from a useful set of vocabulary.
data.value: Filter by CEFR level, topic, and learning context so every session starts from a useful set of vocabulary.

data.name: Mark favorites, revisit recent words, hear pronunciation, and keep your practice tied to real examples.
data.value: Mark favorites, revisit recent words, hear pronunciation, and keep your practice tied to real examples.

data.name: Optional context, meaning, or example sentence
data.value: Optional context, meaning, or example sentence

data.name: Optional note for the content team
data.value: Optional note for the content team

data.name: Pick up where you left off
data.value: Pick up where you left off

data.name: Practice the words, phrases, and examples that show up in planning, reporting, and team coordination.
data.value: Practice the words, phrases, and examples that show up in planning, reporting, and team coordination.

data.name: Type a German lemma to search the catalog.
data.value: Type a German lemma to search the catalog.

data.name: Use starters, scenarios, events, and partner matching to move vocabulary from recognition into speaking.
data.value: Use starters, scenarios, events, and partner matching to move vocabulary from recognition into speaking.

data.name: We could not find {0} in Darwin Lingua.
data.value: We could not find {0} in Darwin Lingua.

data.name: Would you like to suggest this word so the content team can review it and add it to the system?
data.value: Would you like to suggest this word so the content team can review it and add it to the system?

data.name: Administrative tools are only shown to accounts with the right permissions.
data.value: Administrative tools are only shown to accounts with the right permissions.

data.name: Choose the site language and the primary and secondary meaning languages used across word details, scenarios, and practice content.
data.value: Choose the site language and the primary and secondary meaning languages used across word details, scenarios, and practice content.

data.name: No plan events have been recorded yet.
data.value: No plan events have been recorded yet.

data.name: Review trial or premium access, start checkout, open Stripe subscription management, and check billing status.
data.value: Review trial or premium access, start checkout, open Stripe subscription management, and check billing status.

data.name: Set your display name, location, German level, helper languages, goals, availability, and visibility for conversation practice.
data.value: Set your display name, location, German level, helper languages, goals, availability, and visibility for conversation practice.

data.name: Use a strong password and keep your account email up to date.
data.value: Use a strong password and keep your account email up to date.

data.name: Enter your email and choose a password. If the address can be used, Darwin Lingua will send the next account step.
data.value: Enter your email and choose a password. If the address can be used, Darwin Lingua will send the next account step.

data.name: The sign-in attempt could not be completed.
data.value: The sign-in attempt could not be completed.

data.name: This account is temporarily locked. Try again later or contact support.
data.value: This account is temporarily locked. Try again later or contact support.

data.name: Use your Darwin Lingua account email and password. If sign-in cannot continue, check your account email for the next step.
data.value: Use your Darwin Lingua account email and password. If sign-in cannot continue, check your account email for the next step.

data.name: Choose a new password for your Darwin Lingua account. If this link does not work, request a new reset email.
data.value: Choose a new password for your Darwin Lingua account. If this link does not work, request a new reset email.

data.name: Enter your email address and Darwin Lingua will send a recovery link if the account can be reset.
data.value: Enter your email address and Darwin Lingua will send a recovery link if the account can be reset.

data.name: If it does not arrive, check spam or request a new confirmation email.
data.value: If it does not arrive, check spam or request a new confirmation email.

data.name: If the address can receive account email, a Darwin Lingua message has been sent with the next step.
data.value: If the address can receive account email, a Darwin Lingua message has been sent with the next step.

data.name: If the confirmation email expired or did not arrive, request a new one.
data.value: If the confirmation email expired or did not arrive, request a new one.

data.name: The message may be a confirmation or account recovery email depending on the action requested. Links expire automatically.
data.value: The message may be a confirmation or account recovery email depending on the action requested. Links expire automatically.

data.name: This account needs email confirmation before sign-in can continue.
data.value: This account needs email confirmation before sign-in can continue.

data.name: Update your password and keep this account protected.
data.value: Update your password and keep this account protected.

data.name: If the new address can be used, a confirmation email has been sent.
data.value: If the new address can be used, a confirmation email has been sent.

data.name: The current password could not be verified.
data.value: The current password could not be verified.

data.name: The new password and confirmation password do not match.
data.value: The new password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: The {0} must be at least {2} and at max {1} characters long.
data.value: The {0} must be at least {2} and at max {1} characters long.

data.name: This is already your account email.
data.value: This is already your account email.

data.name: This reset link cannot be used.
data.value: This reset link cannot be used.

data.name: This reset link cannot be used. Request a new password reset email.
data.value: This reset link cannot be used. Request a new password reset email.

data.name: Enter your account email and Darwin Lingua will send another confirmation link if one is needed.
data.value: Enter your account email and Darwin Lingua will send another confirmation link if one is needed.

data.name: For privacy, Darwin Lingua shows this same message whether an account exists or not.
data.value: For privacy, Darwin Lingua shows this same message whether an account exists or not.

data.name: If the email belongs to an account that can be reset, a recovery link has been sent.
data.value: If the email belongs to an account that can be reset, a recovery link has been sent.

data.name: The link may be expired, already used, or malformed.
data.value: The link may be expired, already used, or malformed.

data.name: This confirmation link cannot be used
data.value: This confirmation link cannot be used

data.name: This email-change link cannot be used
data.value: This email-change link cannot be used

data.name: Your account email has been updated.
data.value: Your account email has been updated.

data.name: Your Darwin Lingua account is ready to use.
data.value: Your Darwin Lingua account is ready to use.

data.name: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with the new password.
data.value: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with the new password.

data.name: Advanced practice, conversation starters, event preparation, and partner tools.
data.value: Advanced practice, conversation starters, event preparation, and partner tools.

data.name: Checkout could not be started. Please try again later.
data.value: Checkout could not be started. Please try again later.

data.name: Checkout is handled by Stripe; card details are not stored in Darwin Lingua.
data.value: Checkout is handled by Stripe; card details are not stored in Darwin Lingua.

data.name: Checkout returned before Stripe marked the session complete. Your premium access will update as soon as Stripe confirms the subscription.
data.value: Checkout returned before Stripe marked the session complete. Your premium access will update as soon as Stripe confirms the subscription.

data.name: Checkout was cancelled. No plan change was made.
data.value: Checkout was cancelled. No plan change was made.

data.name: Dual meaning languages on supported learning pages.
data.value: Dual meaning languages on supported learning pages.

data.name: Favorites, collections, topic browsing, and recent review workflows.
data.value: Favorites, collections, topic browsing, and recent review workflows.

data.name: Manage your learning access, premium features, and secure subscription checkout.
data.value: Manage your learning access, premium features, and secure subscription checkout.

data.name: No Stripe billing events have been recorded for this account yet.
data.value: No Stripe billing events have been recorded for this account yet.

data.name: No Stripe customer record is linked to this account yet.
data.value: No Stripe customer record is linked to this account yet.

data.name: Online checkout is not enabled in this environment. Your current access remains unchanged.
data.value: Online checkout is not enabled in this environment. Your current access remains unchanged.

data.name: Payment action, premium activation, and premium end notifications are sent by email.
data.value: Payment action, premium activation, and premium end notifications are sent by email.

data.name: Payment completed. Premium access is active.
data.value: Payment completed. Premium access is active.

data.name: Payment completed. Your premium access will update as soon as Stripe confirms the subscription.
data.value: Payment completed. Your premium access will update as soon as Stripe confirms the subscription.

data.name: Stripe billing is not enabled for this environment.
data.value: Stripe billing is not enabled for this environment.

data.name: Stripe checkout is enabled but not fully configured. A secret key, webhook secret, and monthly price id are required.
data.value: Stripe checkout is enabled but not fully configured. A secret key, webhook secret, and monthly price id are required.

data.name: Stripe subscription management when a customer record is linked.
data.value: Stripe subscription management when a customer record is linked.

data.name: Subscription changes are applied from Stripe success return and signed webhooks.
data.value: Subscription changes are applied from Stripe success return and signed webhooks.

data.name: Subscription management could not be opened. Please try again later.
data.value: Subscription management could not be opened. Please try again later.

data.name: Subscription management will be available after your premium subscription is linked.
data.value: Subscription management will be available after your premium subscription is linked.

data.name: Too many checkout attempts. Please wait before trying again.
data.value: Too many checkout attempts. Please wait before trying again.

data.name: Too many subscription management attempts. Please wait before trying again.
data.value: Too many subscription management attempts. Please wait before trying again.

data.name: Unlock favorites, second meaning language, collections, topics, advanced practice, conversation tools, and premium learning workflows.
data.value: Unlock favorites, second meaning language, collections, topics, advanced practice, conversation tools, and premium learning workflows.

data.name: Your plan information could not be loaded right now. Please try again.
data.value: Your plan information could not be loaded right now. Please try again.

data.name: Favorites require an active trial or premium plan.
data.value: Favorites require an active trial or premium plan.

data.name: Open any word to hear pronunciation, review meanings, and continue through the set at your own pace.
data.value: Open any word to hear pronunciation, review meanings, and continue through the set at your own pace.

data.name: Study focused sets built around workplace situations, systems, everyday communication, and practical German topics.
data.value: Study focused sets built around workplace situations, systems, everyday communication, and practical German topics.

data.name: Try a broader level or topic to continue browsing.
data.value: Try a broader level or topic to continue browsing.

data.name: Words will appear here when the collection is ready for study.
data.value: Words will appear here when the collection is ready for study.

data.name: Practice short German phrases by situation, tone, goal, and topic.
data.value: Practice short German phrases by situation, tone, goal, and topic.

data.name: Short phrase sets will appear here when they are ready for practice.
data.value: Short phrase sets will appear here when they are ready for practice.

data.name: This starter pack could not be loaded right now. Please return to starters and try again.
data.value: This starter pack could not be loaded right now. Please return to starters and try again.

data.name: Add Darwin Lingua to your device for a cleaner full-screen learning experience, quicker access from your home screen, and a familiar app-like workspace in supported browsers.
data.value: Add Darwin Lingua to your device for a cleaner full-screen learning experience, quicker access from your home screen, and a familiar app-like workspace in supported browsers.

data.name: Install Darwin Lingua on desktop or mobile.
data.value: Install Darwin Lingua on desktop or mobile.

data.name: Keep high-value vocabulary close so you can return to it before meetings, practice sessions, or review blocks.
data.value: Keep high-value vocabulary close so you can return to it before meetings, practice sessions, or review blocks.

data.name: Keep vocabulary, collections, and practice tools one tap away
data.value: Keep vocabulary, collections, and practice tools one tap away

data.name: Launch directly from your desktop or mobile home screen
data.value: Launch directly from your desktop or mobile home screen

data.name: Open Darwin Lingua in a supported browser
data.value: Open Darwin Lingua in a supported browser

data.name: Open a word detail page and save a few favorites to build this list.
data.value: Open a word detail page and save a few favorites to build this list.

data.name: Pin the app to your taskbar, dock, or home screen
data.value: Pin the app to your taskbar, dock, or home screen

data.name: Please enter a word before sending a suggestion.
data.value: Please enter a word before sending a suggestion.

data.name: Return here if the install prompt is not visible
data.value: Return here if the install prompt is not visible

data.name: Stay signed in on devices you trust
data.value: Stay signed in on devices you trust

data.name: Thanks. {0} was sent to the content team.
data.value: Thanks. {0} was sent to the content team.

data.name: Use a focused full-screen learning window
data.value: Use a focused full-screen learning window

data.name: Use the browser install option when it appears
data.value: Use the browser install option when it appears

data.name: Find online and local opportunities to practice German with other learners and organizers.
data.value: Find online and local opportunities to practice German with other learners and organizers.

data.name: Required RSVP fields are missing or invalid.
data.value: Required RSVP fields are missing or invalid.

data.name: Save your interest or attendance so the organizer can plan capacity.
data.value: Save your interest or attendance so the organizer can plan capacity.

data.name: The RSVP could not be saved right now. Please try again.
data.value: The RSVP could not be saved right now. Please try again.

data.name: This conversation event could not be loaded right now. Please return to events and try again.
data.value: This conversation event could not be loaded right now. Please return to events and try again.

data.name: This conversation event is no longer available.
data.value: This conversation event is no longer available.

data.name: Too many RSVP attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
data.value: Too many RSVP attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

data.name: Try a broader filter or check again when new practice events are available.
data.value: Try a broader filter or check again when new practice events are available.

data.name: Preparation progress could not be saved right now. Please try again.
data.value: Preparation progress could not be saved right now. Please try again.

data.name: This preparation pack could not be loaded right now. Please try again from scenarios or events.
data.value: This preparation pack could not be loaded right now. Please try again from scenarios or events.

data.name: Use these prompts to rehearse what you want to say before the event.
data.value: Use these prompts to rehearse what you want to say before the event.

data.name: A learner email, partner request, or learner profile is required to block.
data.value: A learner email, partner request, or learner profile is required to block.

data.name: Required block fields are missing or invalid.
data.value: Required block fields are missing or invalid.

data.name: Required report fields are missing or invalid.
data.value: Required report fields are missing or invalid.

data.name: The moderation request could not be saved right now. Please try again.
data.value: The moderation request could not be saved right now. Please try again.

data.name: The selected block target is not supported.
data.value: The selected block target is not supported.

data.name: The selected moderation target is no longer available.
data.value: The selected moderation target is no longer available.

data.name: The selected report target or reason is not supported.
data.value: The selected report target or reason is not supported.

data.name: Too many block attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
data.value: Too many block attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

data.name: Too many reports submitted. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
data.value: Too many reports submitted. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

data.name: Comma-separated language codes you can use while practicing.
data.value: Comma-separated language codes you can use while practicing.

data.name: I confirm this learner profile is for an adult learner.
data.value: I confirm this learner profile is for an adult learner.

data.name: Private keeps the profile hidden; request-only allows controlled matching.
data.value: Private keeps the profile hidden; request-only allows controlled matching.

data.name: Required profile fields are missing or invalid.
data.value: Required profile fields are missing or invalid.

data.name: The learner profile could not be saved because it conflicts with existing data.
data.value: The learner profile could not be saved because it conflicts with existing data.

data.name: The learner profile operation could not be completed. Review the fields and try again.
data.value: The learner profile operation could not be completed. Review the fields and try again.

data.name: This is the name other learners see.
data.value: This is the name other learners see.

data.name: Update your display name, level, languages, goals, availability, and visibility for conversation practice.
data.value: Update your display name, level, languages, goals, availability, and visibility for conversation practice.

data.name: Partner matching is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
data.value: Partner matching is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.

data.name: Send request-based introductions without open chat. Contact details appear only after a request is accepted.
data.value: Send request-based introductions without open chat. Contact details appear only after a request is accepted.

data.name: The partner request could not be sent right now. Please try again.
data.value: The partner request could not be sent right now. Please try again.

data.name: The partner request could not be updated right now. Please try again.
data.value: The partner request could not be updated right now. Please try again.

data.name: The partner request is missing required fields.
data.value: The partner request is missing required fields.

data.name: The selected opener is not supported.
data.value: The selected opener is not supported.

data.name: The selected partner request action is not supported.
data.value: The selected partner request action is not supported.

data.name: The selected partner request or learner profile is no longer available.
data.value: The selected partner request or learner profile is no longer available.

data.name: Too many partner requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
data.value: Too many partner requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

data.name: Account email addresses are used for sign-in, email confirmation, password reset, security notifications, and support workflows.
data.value: Account email addresses are used for sign-in, email confirmation, password reset, security notifications, and support workflows.

data.name: Admin and operator access is limited by role-based authorization and is used for support, moderation, publishing, diagnostics, and operational review.
data.value: Admin and operator access is limited by role-based authorization and is used for support, moderation, publishing, diagnostics, and operational review.

data.name: Before public production launch, the production email provider and any required data-processing agreement must be reviewed by the release owner.
data.value: Before public production launch, the production email provider and any required data-processing agreement must be reviewed by the release owner.

data.name: Darwin Lingua sends transactional emails for registration confirmation, password reset, email change, organizer claims, RSVP confirmations, partner-request outcomes, moderation alerts, and account security events.
data.value: Darwin Lingua sends transactional emails for registration confirmation, password reset, email change, organizer claims, RSVP confirmations, partner-request outcomes, moderation alerts, and account security events.

data.name: Darwin Lingua uses account, learning, organizer, moderation, and operational data to run the language-learning service, protect users, and support account recovery.
data.value: Darwin Lingua uses account, learning, organizer, moderation, and operational data to run the language-learning service, protect users, and support account recovery.

data.name: Delivery diagnostics store scenario, template, culture, provider, status, safe failure summaries, timestamps, and a hashed recipient email value.
data.value: Delivery diagnostics store scenario, template, culture, provider, status, safe failure summaries, timestamps, and a hashed recipient email value.

data.name: Delivery logs are retained only for the configured operational retention period and can be cleaned up by authorized admins.
data.value: Delivery logs are retained only for the configured operational retention period and can be cleaned up by authorized admins.

data.name: Email providers may process recipient email addresses, message metadata, and message content strictly to deliver transactional emails and report delivery status.
data.value: Email providers may process recipient email addresses, message metadata, and message content strictly to deliver transactional emails and report delivery status.

data.name: Learning preferences, favorites, recent activity, learner profiles, organizer claims, partner requests, RSVP records, and moderation reports are stored to provide requested product features.
data.value: Learning preferences, favorites, recent activity, learner profiles, organizer claims, partner requests, RSVP records, and moderation reports are stored to provide requested product features.

data.name: Production and staging email delivery may be processed by an external email provider configured by the operator.
data.value: Production and staging email delivery may be processed by an external email provider configured by the operator.

data.name: Reset tokens, confirmation tokens, full recovery links, and full magic links are not stored in delivery logs.
data.value: Reset tokens, confirmation tokens, full recovery links, and full magic links are not stored in delivery logs.

data.name: Support contact addresses are monitored for account recovery and operational support.
data.value: Support contact addresses are monitored for account recovery and operational support.

data.name: Transactional emails are not marketing emails and are not used for newsletters or promotional campaigns.
data.value: Transactional emails are not marketing emails and are not used for newsletters or promotional campaigns.

data.name: Claim request could not be submitted right now. Please try again.
data.value: Claim request could not be submitted right now. Please try again.

data.name: Find clubs, teachers, cafes, and organizations that host German practice opportunities.
data.value: Find clubs, teachers, cafes, and organizations that host German practice opportunities.

data.name: Manage reviewed organizer listings assigned to your account.
data.value: Manage reviewed organizer listings assigned to your account.

data.name: No organizer profiles are assigned to {0} yet.
data.value: No organizer profiles are assigned to {0} yet.

data.name: Organizer dashboard is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
data.value: Organizer dashboard is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.

data.name: Organizer profiles will appear here after they are reviewed.
data.value: Organizer profiles will appear here after they are reviewed.

data.name: Required claim fields are missing or invalid.
data.value: Required claim fields are missing or invalid.

data.name: Some organizer dashboard data could not be loaded.
data.value: Some organizer dashboard data could not be loaded.

data.name: Tell us how you are connected to this organizer so the listing can be assigned safely.
data.value: Tell us how you are connected to this organizer so the listing can be assigned safely.

data.name: The {0} organizer plan allows {1} active event(s).
data.value: The {0} organizer plan allows {1} active event(s).

data.name: The claim request could not be submitted right now. Please try again.
data.value: The claim request could not be submitted right now. Please try again.

data.name: The event publication status could not be updated right now. Please try again.
data.value: The event publication status could not be updated right now. Please try again.

data.name: The organizer event could not be saved right now. Please try again.
data.value: The organizer event could not be saved right now. Please try again.

data.name: The organizer profile could not be saved right now. Please try again.
data.value: The organizer profile could not be saved right now. Please try again.

data.name: The organizer {0} could not be saved because it conflicts with existing data.
data.value: The organizer {0} could not be saved because it conflicts with existing data.

data.name: The organizer {0} operation could not be completed. Review the fields and try again.
data.value: The organizer {0} operation could not be completed. Review the fields and try again.

data.name: The RSVP status could not be updated right now. Please try again.
data.value: The RSVP status could not be updated right now. Please try again.

data.name: The selected publication status is not supported.
data.value: The selected publication status is not supported.

data.name: The selected RSVP status is not supported.
data.value: The selected RSVP status is not supported.

data.name: This organizer does not have any active events right now.
data.value: This organizer does not have any active events right now.

data.name: This organizer profile could not be loaded right now. Please return to organizers and try again.
data.value: This organizer profile could not be loaded right now. Please return to organizers and try again.

data.name: This organizer profile is no longer available.
data.value: This organizer profile is no longer available.

data.name: Too many claim attempts. Please wait before submitting again.
data.value: Too many claim attempts. Please wait before submitting again.

data.name: Open a few word detail pages and they will appear here.
data.value: Open a few word detail pages and they will appear here.

data.name: Return to words you opened recently and continue your study without searching again.
data.value: Return to words you opened recently and continue your study without searching again.

data.name: Guided practice situations will appear here when they are ready for study.
data.value: Guided practice situations will appear here when they are ready for study.

data.name: Practice dialogue, useful phrases, and quick checks for real-life tasks.
data.value: Practice dialogue, useful phrases, and quick checks for real-life tasks.

data.name: This scenario does not have a guided response sequence yet.
data.value: This scenario does not have a guided response sequence yet.

data.name: Conversation events available in the directory.
data.value: Conversation events available in the directory.

data.name: Imported rows in the latest upload.
data.value: Imported rows in the latest upload.

data.name: Monitor catalog health, publishing, user entitlements, reports, events, billing, and email delivery from one workspace.
data.value: Monitor catalog health, publishing, user entitlements, reports, events, billing, and email delivery from one workspace.

data.name: Review lexical entries across every publication state before editing, creation, and import workflows are attached.
data.value: Review lexical entries across every publication state before editing, creation, and import workflows are attached.

data.name: The current filter did not match any catalog entries.
data.value: The current filter did not match any catalog entries.

data.name: Upload a curated JSON file to create multiple catalog words with senses, translations, and examples.
data.value: Upload a curated JSON file to create multiple catalog words with senses, translations, and examples.

data.name: Add this label to the word?
data.value: Add this label to the word?

data.name: Add this topic to the word?
data.value: Add this topic to the word?

data.name: All stored languages are shown here. The primary switches only choose the default item shown first; they do not hide other languages.
data.value: All stored languages are shown here. The primary switches only choose the default item shown first; they do not hide other languages.

data.name: Edit the full admin record. Learner language preferences do not limit the languages shown here.
data.value: Edit the full admin record. Learner language preferences do not limit the languages shown here.

data.name: Remove this label from the word?
data.value: Remove this label from the word?

data.name: Remove this topic from the word?
data.value: Remove this topic from the word?

data.name: Status, CEFR, source, forms, and pronunciation are editable here.
data.value: Status, CEFR, source, forms, and pronunciation are editable here.

data.name: Delete this example and its translations?
data.value: Delete this example and its translations?

data.name: No grammar notes or collocations recorded.
data.value: No grammar notes or collocations recorded.

data.name: No translations for this example yet.
data.value: No translations for this example yet.

data.name: No billing configuration warnings detected. Stripe dashboard settings still require external verification.
data.value: No billing configuration warnings detected. Stripe dashboard settings still require external verification.

data.name: No billing profiles have been recorded yet.
data.value: No billing profiles have been recorded yet.

data.name: No Stripe billing events have been recorded yet.
data.value: No Stripe billing events have been recorded yet.

data.name: Refresh one subscription directly from Stripe when a webhook is delayed, missed, or failed. This calls Stripe and may update local entitlement state.
data.value: Refresh one subscription directly from Stripe when a webhook is delayed, missed, or failed. This calls Stripe and may update local entitlement state.

data.name: Refresh this subscription from Stripe and reconcile the local entitlement state?
data.value: Refresh this subscription from Stripe and reconcile the local entitlement state?

data.name: Stripe customer, subscription, and webhook state for entitlement reconciliation.
data.value: Stripe customer, subscription, and webhook state for entitlement reconciliation.

data.name: Admin-only reconciliation tool. Use this only when Brevo dashboard data did not arrive through webhook.
data.value: Admin-only reconciliation tool. Use this only when Brevo dashboard data did not arrive through webhook.

data.name: Cleanup is limited to admins because it deletes operational audit data.
data.value: Cleanup is limited to admins because it deletes operational audit data.

data.name: Delete old email delivery logs outside the retention window?
data.value: Delete old email delivery logs outside the retention window?

data.name: Delivery logs are retained for {0} days. Cleanup removes only entries older than that retention window.
data.value: Delivery logs are retained for {0} days. Cleanup removes only entries older than that retention window.

data.name: Generate a new confirmation token for an unconfirmed account. Password reset emails are not resent from diagnostics, and the result message intentionally avoids account enumeration.
data.value: Generate a new confirmation token for an unconfirmed account. Password reset emails are not resent from diagnostics, and the result message intentionally avoids account enumeration.

data.name: Manual reconciliation or Brevo dashboard reason
data.value: Manual reconciliation or Brevo dashboard reason

data.name: No configuration warnings detected. DNS and provider DPA still require external verification before production launch.
data.value: No configuration warnings detected. DNS and provider DPA still require external verification before production launch.

data.name: No transactional email delivery attempts have been recorded yet.
data.value: No transactional email delivery attempts have been recorded yet.

data.name: Permanent Brevo events such as hard bounce, blocked, invalid email, and spam add a hashed recipient to the internal suppression list. Raw recipient email addresses are not stored here.
data.value: Permanent Brevo events such as hard bounce, blocked, invalid email, and spam add a hashed recipient to the internal suppression list. Raw recipient email addresses are not stored here.

data.name: Recent account email delivery attempts are listed without reset tokens, confirmation tokens, or full recovery URLs.
data.value: Recent account email delivery attempts are listed without reset tokens, confirmation tokens, or full recovery URLs.

data.name: Record this provider event manually and update delivery state?
data.value: Record this provider event manually and update delivery state?

data.name: Remove this recipient hash from the suppression list? Future transactional email may be attempted again.
data.value: Remove this recipient hash from the suppression list? Future transactional email may be attempted again.

data.name: Send a new confirmation email to this account?
data.value: Send a new confirmation email to this account?

data.name: Compare your answer with the model answer, then replay the line aloud.
data.value: Compare your answer with the model answer, then replay the line aloud.

data.name: This guided roleplay could not be loaded right now. Please return to scenarios and try again.
data.value: This guided roleplay could not be loaded right now. Please return to scenarios and try again.

data.name: This practice scenario could not be loaded right now. Please return to scenarios and try again.
data.value: This practice scenario could not be loaded right now. Please return to scenarios and try again.

data.name: This word could not be loaded right now. Please try again from browse or search.
data.value: This word could not be loaded right now. Please try again from browse or search.

data.name: Approve this organizer claim and notify the requester?
data.value: Approve this organizer claim and notify the requester?

data.name: Approving a claim records the decision and sends the requester email. Assign owner access separately when the requester should manage the organizer profile.
data.value: Approving a claim records the decision and sends the requester email. Assign owner access separately when the requester should manage the organizer profile.

data.name: Assign this owner email to the organizer profile?
data.value: Assign this owner email to the organizer profile?

data.name: Create or replace public organizer pages before enabling organizer self-service.
data.value: Create or replace public organizer pages before enabling organizer self-service.

data.name: Mark this organizer claim as reviewing?
data.value: Mark this organizer claim as reviewing?

data.name: Reject this organizer claim and notify the requester?
data.value: Reject this organizer claim and notify the requester?
